dlg.text: You've done it. As you shared about yourself with the reluctant cat, its ears perked up, and it turned toward you to listen attentively. By the time you finished, you even saw it smile!
Oh, it's so nice to meet you! I didn't know there were such kind people here. I should, um, introduce myself. My name is Mousifer.
dlg.speaker: Reluctant Cat

dlg.text: I, um, didn't mean to be rude earlier; I suppose I was feeling kind of shy. You see, I've never been outside my **homeland** before. We Circuit Cats like to stay in our own communities, for the most part.
dlg.speaker: Mousifer

dlg.text: With all the **rains**, though, lots of us have had to leave. It's no good for us to be around water too much, and the storms have been going for months now. The elder cats say they've never seen anything like it.
dlg.speaker: Mousifer

dlg.text: Anyway, I'm just looking for a dry place to stay until the storms are all over and I can return home. Maybe ... maybe this wouldn't be such a bad place to stay for a while after all - if you're staying too, I mean?
dlg.speaker: Mousifer

dlg.text: The thing is, I can be a little shy. I suppose you've noticed that, huh? I was wondering ... could you help me meet some of the other people here, too?
dlg.speaker: Mousifer

choices.text: Help Mousifer get to know the other students

end.label: My Pixel Academy: Prequels & Origins
end.sub: Time to meet the other students!
